title: Repetition
text: Repetition Determines whether the label is repeated when multiple occurrences are drawn. Valid values are Do no repeat (default), Repeat if not empty , or Repeat . Value Description Do no repeat Do not repeat the label. Repeat if not empty Repeat the label if the attached field contains data. Repeat label for each occurrence of the entity. Description This property can be set only via the pop-up menu on a label. Applies To Label Related Links Labels in Forms and Reports Labels are objects that contain static. Most labels are associated with a field, but unassociated labels can be used for any static text on the component. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
